issues.sample: WE BOUGHT THIS VEHICLE IN JUNE OF 2015 AND ABOUT 2 OR 3 MOTHS AFTER I NOTICED THAT THE REAR DRIVER SIDE ROTOR HAD A DEEP SCRATCH ON IT. THEY FIXED IT BY SANDING THE ROTOR INSTED OF REPLACING THE ROTOR. NEXT TIME I BROUGHT WAS AN OIL LEAK ON THE FRONT SIDE OF THE MOTOR ABOUT 4000M

narrative.headline: What 2015 Mazda Cx-9 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 35 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Engine (49% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
